item.title: Harmony H22 Bass 1960s - Sunburst — $950
item.description:
$950 · Poor · Dukes Vintage

Vintage Harmony H22 Bass from the 1960s. Original Sunburst Finish. Has hilariously high action and the neck is bowed. Very likely going to need a new truss rod. It is currently set up where it is most comfortable to play given the circumstances. It is missing one dot inlay in the fretboard and has vintage but unoriginal tuners. The electronics are original. Reproduction pickguard included.

item.title: Epiphone Newport 4 String Short Scale Bass Sunset Yellow #2437 Used — $229
item.description:
$229 · Very Good · Specialty Traders

8.25 lbs

Used with wear associated with use. Minor light cosmetic scratches from handling and play. Any noteworthy blemishes or issues will be described and pictured. Works as it should.

The Epiphone Newport Bass is an all-original design that debuted in 1961. The modern Newport Bass pays tribute to that rare vintage model while offering refinements to meet the needs of today’s bassists. The 30.5” scale length and comfortable Medium C profile make it suitable for players with a wide range of hand sizes, while the symmetrical double-cutaway body ensures excellent access to every fret. The Bass Sidewinder neck pickup provides rich, deep tones, while the TB PRO in the bridge position delivers brighter timbres. The two pickups are paired with master volume and tone controls and a blend knob so you can get precisely the tonal balance you desire.

Specifications

Body Specs

Body Finish Gloss

Body Material Mahogany

Body Shape Newport

Body Styles Double Cut

Neck Specs

Fingerboard Material Laurel

Fingerboard Radius 304.8mm / 12.0in

Fret Count 20

Frets Medium Jumbo

Inlays Pearloid Dot

Joint Glued In, Set Neck

Neck Material Mahogany

Nut Material PVC

Nut Width 41.5mm / 1.63in

Profile Medium C

Scale Length 774.0mm / 30.47in

Electronics Specs

Bridge Pickup TB PRO

Controls Master Volume, Blend Knob, Master Tone

Neck Pickup Bass Sidewinder

Output Jack Epiphone 1/4" Heavy-Duty

Hardware Specs

Control Covers Black

finish Nickel

Misc Specs

item.title: Sandberg California TM4 Superlight Royal Blue — $2,609.01
item.description:
$2,609.01 · Brand New · Dijkmans Guitars

De Sandberg California TM4 Superlight Royal Blue die kleur en karakter combineert

De Sandberg California TM4 Superlight in Royal Blue is een bas die direct opvalt. De diepe, rijke blauwe kleur geeft het instrument een uitstraling die zowel op het podium als in de studio de aandacht trekt. De Paulownia body houdt het gewicht laag zonder in te leveren op toon: open, resonant en met een natuurlijke warmte die je direct voelt zodra je de bas oppakt.

De Sandberg Blacklabel pickups leveren een veelzijdig klankpalet van warme, volle fundamenten tot strakke, gearticuleerde tonen met bite. De 2-band EQ met split switch geeft je directe controle over je geluid. Het Pau Ferro fretboard speelt soepel en snel, met een heldere toonaanslag die bijzonder goed werkt in zowel studio als live-situaties.

De hals is van Canadian Hard Rock Maple in een 6-delige gelamineerde constructie, stabiel en consistent onder alle omstandigheden. Met 22 frets op een 34"-mensuur, een 14" radius en Sandberg Classic chrome tuners is de speelbaarheid precies zoals je van een Sandberg mag verwachten. Het zwarte pickguard en de chrome hardware completeren de look op een smaakvolle manier.

De California TM4 Superlight Royal Blue is beschikbaar als pre-order.

item.title: 1982 Daion Power Mark XX-B Bass W/OHSC MIJ — $1,275
item.description:
$1,275 · Very Good · Tidewater Vintage

1982 Daion Power Markk XX-B Bass        
SN: 821000
Condition: Very Good showing light players wear, small blemishes mainly above the tailpiece (as seen) otherwise, a great looking bass
Color: Walnut
Mod's/Upgrades: Knobs replaced
Breaks Or Repairs: No
Weight: 8lbs 2oz
Scale Length: 34”
Nut Width: 1 11/16”
Case: Original Hardshell Case

The Daion Power Mark XX-B is a vintage, high-end electric bass guitar produced in Japan by Yamaki between approximately 1978 and 1984. Known for its "neck-through" construction and premium materials, it was the flagship model and top-of-the-line in Daion’s Power Series.

Specifications

  • Construction: Features a 9-piece laminated through-body neck made of alternating maple and rosewood.
  • Body: Multi-piece body typically made of ash with maple or rosewood laminations.
  • Pickups: Equipped with a "P/J" pickup configuration, consisting of a split-coil at the neck and an 8-pole single coil at the bridge.
  • Fretboard: 24-fret (two-octave) rosewood fingerboard featuring dot markers and ivory-colored celluloid binding.
  • Hardware: Heavy-duty brass nut and bridge saddles for improved sustain.
  • Controls: Dual volume and tone knobs with a three-way pickup selector switch

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 5 BLK RW 1998 — $2,609.95
item.description:
$2,609.95 · Excellent · Guitar-Place

The StingRay was introduced in 1976 and has become a classic, just like Fender's Precision or J-Bass. But while these have undergone more or less significant modifications over the years, the folks at Music Man apparently felt there was nothing left to improve on in the original design. And they were probably right.

The Stingray 5 shown here was made in 1998 and is in incredibly pristine condition. It almost looks like a brand new instrument – ​​no scratches, dings, or dents, and the frets and fretboard are in perfect condition. We acquired this bass from its original owner and see no reason why it shouldn't be a faithful and fantastic-sounding companion for its new owner for decades to come.

  • Weight: 4870 Gramm

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505MS Headless 5 String Bass Pacific Blue Burst Flat B-Stock — $1,519
item.description:
$1,519 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

Ibanez EHB1505MS Headless 5-String Bass Pacific Blue Burst Flat B-Stock

The EHB1505MS delivers exceptional balance and ergonomic comfort through its headless design and multi-scale construction, making it equally at home seated or standing for extended sessions. Its chambered African mahogany body with poplar burl top feels noticeably lighter than conventional basses while maintaining the resonant warmth and sustain that working bassists depend on. This B-Stock unit shows only light cosmetic dents on the back edge—no impact on playability or performance.

Playability & Construction

The multi-scale design spans 35" to 33" (889mm to 838mm), providing ideal string tension and even tone response across all five strings. A 9-piece graphite-reinforced panga panga and walnut neck ensures rock-solid stability, while the bound panga panga fingerboard features 24 stainless steel fanned frets with offset abalone dot inlays and luminescent side dots for clear visibility in any lighting condition.

Tone & Electronics

A pair of Nordstrand Custom Big Split passive pickups deliver articulate, full-range tone with hum-canceling design, while the Vari-Mid 3-Band EQ with EQ bypass allows you to shape your sound from transparent and natural to sculpted and modern. The treble pot functions as a passive tone control when the EQ is bypassed, giving you immediate access to classic passive bass response.

Key Features
  • Chambered poplar burl top on selected lightweight African mahogany body
  • Chambered double cutaway body with ergonomic slanted back design
  • 9-piece graphite-reinforced roasted panga panga and walnut neck
  • Bound panga panga fingerboard with 24 stainless steel fanned frets and offset abalone dot position markers
  • Luminescent side dots for stage visibility
  • Multi-scale design: 889mm (35") to 838mm (33") scale lengths
  • 45mm nut width with 500mmR radius
  • Pair of Nordstrand Custom Big Split passive pickups
  • Vari-Mid 3-Band EQ with EQ bypass switch and passive treble control
  • MR5HS bridge with 18mm string spacing and ±1.5mm adjustability
  • Schaller S-Lock strap locks and Neutrik locking jack
  • Factory strung with D'Addario EXL170-5SL (.045–.130) in 1G–5B tuning; includes detachable finger ramp and Ibanez gig bag

The EHB1505MS represents a complete modern bass platform—combining ergonomic innovation, tonal versatility, and professional-grade hardware in a visually striking package that performs at the highest level.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections on the finish typical of B-Stock inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. A premium Ibanez headless 5-string instrument offered at a significant B-Stock discount while maintaining full manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Precision Bass PJ, Lake Placid Blue — $385.77
item.description:
$385.77 · Excellent · Mo's Music Market

Mo Says...

A classic P Bass with a secret Jazz Bass dagger in the boot. Lake Placid Blue gives it that cool-stage shimmer, while the PJ setup keeps the tone chest full of treasure.

Notable Particulars

  • Precision/Jazz pickup configuration > combines the thick, punchy sound of a split-coil P Bass pickup with the extra bite and definition of a Jazz Bass bridge pickup.
  • Vintage Modified series styling > delivers classic Fender-inspired character with practical modern playability.
  • 4-string electric bass > a familiar, reliable setup for practice, recording, gigging and general low-end adventuring.
  • Versatile tonal range > great for rock, indie, punk, funk, blues and pop, from warm thump to sharper growl.
  • Lake Placid Blue finish > a timeless metallic blue look with proper stage presence and vintage charm.

The Details

The Squier Vintage Modified Precision Bass PJ in Lake Placid Blue is a superbly versatile bass with classic looks and a very useful tonal trick up its sleeve. The split-coil Precision Bass pickup delivers the warm, full-bodied punch that has powered countless records, while the Jazz Bass bridge pickup adds brightness, edge and extra articulation when you need to cut through the mix. Its comfortable 4-string layout makes it an inviting choice for developing players, yet the PJ pickup setup gives it enough flexibility for more seasoned hands too. Finished in the ever-dashing Lake Placid Blue, this Squier has the charm of a vintage dancehall hero and the practical spirit of a trusty tour companion.

item.title: 2000 Yamaha SBV500 Bass Guitar MIJ Japan w/ Gig Bag Manual & Model Card — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Very Good · Tone House

2000 Yamaha SBV500 Bass Guitar MIJ Japan w/ Gig Bag Manual & Model Card

2000 Yamaha SBV500 Electric Bass Guitar – Made in Japan

Offered here is a 2000 Yamaha SBV500 electric bass guitar, a unique and highly recognizable model inspired by Yamaha's iconic 1960s designs. With its distinctive reverse-cutaway body, dual single-coil pickups, and exceptional Japanese craftsmanship, the SBV500 delivers vintage-inspired style with modern playability and versatility.

Built in Japan, the SBV500 has become increasingly sought after by players and collectors alike thanks to its unique appearance, comfortable ergonomics, and punchy single-coil tones. The sculpted alder body balances comfortably on a strap, while the slim 34" scale maple neck provides excellent playability and strong note definition.

Specifications:

  • Model: SBV500
  • Year: 2000
  • Serial Number: 0024133
  • Country of Origin: Japan
  • Body: Alder
  • Neck: Bolt-On Maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 250mm (10")
  • Frets: 20
  • Scale Length: 34" (864mm)
  • Weight: 8 lbs 5 oz

Electronics & Hardware:

  • Two Single-Coil Bass Pickups
  • Two Volume Controls
  • Master Tone Control
  • Vintage-Style Chrome Bridge with Individual Saddles
  • Chrome Hardware

Included:

  • Gig Bag
  • Original Manual
  • Model Card

Condition:

This bass is in very good overall condition and shows light wear consistent with normal use. There is some paint chipping along the side of the headstock along with minor cosmetic wear throughout, but nothing that affects functionality or playability.

The bass has been professionally set up with smooth, low playing action and is fully functional.

With its unmistakable styling, quality Japanese construction, and versatile single-coil tone, the Yamaha SBV500 is a fantastic choice for players seeking something distinctive both visually and sonically.



  • At Tone House, we're not just sellers, we're passionate musicians, gear aficionados, and seasoned professionals dedicated to the craft of making music. We take pride in our curated music collection. We love giving these vintage and rare pieces new life through maintenance and upkeep. With full-time technicians on staff, rest assured that each piece is thoroughly examined and tested before being professionally packed.

Once your order is in transit, automatic tracking information is provided, allowing you to monitor its journey from our shop to your doorstep with ease.

The units/items you see in our pictures are precisely what you'll receive. Have questions? Feel free to ask before making a purchase. Additionally, we offer custom modifications, within reason, to many of the guitars and products we sell, ensuring they perfectly suit your unique requirements.

item.title: 1979 Ibanez MC924 - Dark Stain - OHSC — $1,928.85

1979 Ibanez MC-924 Musician Bass made in Japan. Good condition with the original hard case. Dark stain finish, 2 pickups with active electronics and a 3-band EQ. Serial number: L794662 Weight: 9 lbs 12 oz / 4.43 kg. Nut width: 41 mm. Depth at 1st fret: 21 mm. 

Good condition overall, but lots of dings and scuffs around the edges of the body. All electronics work as they should. The frets are in great shape, and the bass has been fully set up in our workshop with great action. The bass is strung with D'Addario Chrome Flatwound strings. item.title: Fender American Ultra Precision Bass 0199010712 2023 - Ultraburst — $1,656.70
item.description:
$1,656.70 · Excellent · SJM Guitars and Band

American Ultra is Fender's most advanced series of guitars and basses for discerning players who demand the ultimate in precision, performance and tone. The American Ultra Precision Bass features a unique "Modern D" neck profile with Ultra rolled fingerboard edges for hours of playing comfort, and the tapered neck heel allows easy access to the highest register. A speedy 10"-14" compound-radius fingerboard with 21 medium-jumbo frets means effortless action, while the Ultra Noiseless™ Vintage pickups and advanced wiring options provide endless tonal possibilities - without hum. The sculpted rear body contours are as beautiful as they are functional. This versatile, state-of-the-art instrument will inspire you to push your playing to new heights.

Other features include "F"-stamped lightweight vintage-paddle tuning machines with tapered shafts, chrome hardware and bone nut. Includes premium molded hardshell case.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX304 Candy Apple Red — $441.08
item.description:
$441.08 · Excellent · Mo's Music Market

Mo Says...

A crimson low-end compass for bold explorers, the Yamaha TRBX304 serves punch, balance and stage-ready swagger with a red metallic glint worthy of a midnight festival raid.

Notable Particulars

  • 4-string electric bass > reliable, versatile format for beginners, gigging players and studio adventurers alike.
  • Active electronics > offers powerful tone shaping for rock, funk, pop, metal and everything hiding in the jungle between.
  • Performance EQ switch > quickly calls up useful tonal voices, helping you move from deep thump to sharp attack with ease.
  • Comfortable modern body design > built for long rehearsals, stage sets and late-night writing quests without wrestling the instrument.
  • Candy Apple Red finish > a striking, polished look that catches the eye before the first note even growls.

The Details

The Yamaha TRBX304 in Candy Apple Red is a sleek, modern 4-string bass designed for players who need dependable performance, flexible tones and a comfortable feel. Its active circuitry and performance-focused EQ options make it easy to dial in everything from warm, rounded grooves to bright, articulate lines, while the contoured body keeps things comfortable whether you are practising at home, recording in the studio or prowling the stage. Finished in a bold red, this TRBX304 has the look of a showpiece and the work ethic of a trusty road companion. A fine choice for bassists seeking Yamaha reliability with a little extra fire in the engine.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass, Maple Fingerboard, 3-Color Sunburst (U11)(45037) (45037) — $1,559
item.description:
$1,559 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 9lbs 6oz

Up for sale is a Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass in 3 color sunburst. This one came to us in great shape and plays fantastic. The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with the Fender molded case and COA.

The American Professional II Jazz Bass draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration and evolution to meet the demands of today's working player.

Our popular Slim "C" neck now sports smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin finish and a newly sculpted neck heel for a supremely comfortable feel and easy access to the upper register. New V-Mod II Jazz Bass single-coil pickups are more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and clarity the Jazz Bass is known for.

The American Pro II Jazz Bass delivers instant familiarity and sonic versatility you'll feel and hear right away, with broad ranging improvements that add up to nothing less than a new standard for professional instruments.

Features

  • Two V-Mod II single-coil Jazz Bass pickups

  • Slim "C"-shaped neck profile with rolled fingerboard edges

  • Bone nut

  • HiMass™ Vintage bridge for increased sustain

  • Posiflex™ graphite rods for neck reinforcement

  • Includes Deluxe Molded hardshell case

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass, Maple Fingerboard, Coral Red (SR)(24745) (24745) — $689
item.description:
$689 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 8lbs 14oz

Up for sale is a Fender Player II Jazz Bass in Coral Red. This one came to us in great shape! The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one does not come with a case.

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

FEATURES:
Contoured Alder Body
Modern "C" Neck Profile
9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass Pickups
4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
Open-Gear Tuning Machines

This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. Case not included.

The Classic Vibe Jaguar Bass turns up the volume on retro style, combining the iconic body shape of the Jaguar with the massive tone of its Fender-Designed alnico pickups. Player-friendly features include a medium 32 scale length, a slim, comfortable C-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

  • Inspired by 1970s-era Jaguar models

item.description:
$3,588.08 · Excellent · Andy Baxter Bass & Guitars Ltd

2010 Music Man Ball Family Reserve StingRay Bass - 4H 3EQ - Black Sparkle finish in excellent + condition. It has a black pickguard and a roasted, birdseye maple neck with an ebony fingerboard. Original case included. Serial number: E76404. Nut width 43.2 mm. Depth at 1st fret 21.5 mm. Weight 10 lbs 6 oz / 4.71 kg. 

The finish is mostly immaculate. The only noticeable wear is a couple of small dings on the lower back edge. The frets are in superb condition with tons of life left in them. The neck is straight, and the truss rod works as it should. Fully set up in our workshop with a fresh set of La Bella Nickel RX-N4A round-wound 40-100 strings.

item.title: Sandberg California TM5 Superlight 3-Tone Sunburst — $2,792.75
item.description:
$2,792.75 · Brand New · Dijkmans Guitars

De Superlight TM5 met 3-Tone Sunburst die klassieke stijl en vijf snaren combineert

De Sandberg California TM5 Superlight in 3-Tone Sunburst is een bas die direct opvalt. De rijke drietoonse burst-afwerking met white binding geeft het instrument een premium, vintage-geïnspireerde uitstraling die op elk podium de aandacht trekt. De Paulownia body houdt het gewicht laag zonder in te leveren op toon: open, resonant en met een natuurlijke warmte die je direct voelt zodra je de bas oppakt.

De Sandberg Blacklabel pickups leveren een veelzijdig klankpalet dat naadloos aansluit op de TM-filosofie: van warme, volle fundamenten tot strakke, gearticuleerde tonen met bite. De 2-band EQ met split switch geeft je directe controle over je geluid, ook op de laagste B-snaar. Het Pau Ferro fretboard speelt soepel en snel, met een heldere toonaanslag die bijzonder goed werkt in zowel studio als live-situaties.

De hals is van Canadian Hard Rock Maple in een 6-delige gelamineerde constructie, stabiel en consistent onder alle omstandigheden. Met 22 frets op een 34"-mensuur, een 14" radius en Sandberg Classic chrome tuners is de speelbaarheid precies zoals je van een Sandberg mag verwachten. Het zwarte pickguard en de chrome hardware completeren de look op een smaakvolle manier.

Een Superlight TM5 met karakter en stijl: de California TM5 Superlight 3-Tone Sunburst is beschikbaar als pre-order.

item.description:
$1,099 · Very Good · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • A generic gig bag [not pictured] will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: 【used】Freedom Custom Guitar Research / C.S. Retro Series JB 4st MUM 2024 4.390kg #1755【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $3,623
item.description:
$3,623 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Freedom is a Tokyo-based guitar workshop that enjoys overwhelming support from professional musicians in Japan, and in recent years, its name has begun to resonate overseas.

Originally highly regarded for its repair work, the workshop now focuses on manufacturing, and its creations are loved by many musicians for their high quality and rational design sense.

All basses from this brand are manufactured in Tokyo.

Through strict quality control, the wood used is carefully selected, and any wood that does not meet the standards is not used in the products.

This level of quality control is possible precisely because it is a small workshop.

In that sense, the quality is fundamentally different from that of products made in large factories.

This is a 4-string JB replica model.

The body is made of Alder 2pc, and the fingerboard is Indian Rosewood.

A classic combination with a rich midrange.

The finish is original MUM.

It is finished with urethane.

The matching headstock gives it a cool look.

Original stainless steel frets are used.

This is a WARM type, retaining the advantages of stainless steel—not too hard, yet retaining its shine.

The pickups are original Bell Bottom pickups.

The appeal of Fender vintage guitars lies in their wide tonal range, powerful overall sound, and solid midrange.

This is a superb instrument that fully embodies that appeal while mixing in modern elements such as stainless steel frets.

The MIJ brand consistently delivers high quality; a truly exceptional brand.

Please come and see it in person at our store.

Fret life is approximately 85%.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

There are minor scratches on the body and paintwork. There are also some buckle-like scratches on the back of the body.

The electronics are in good condition.

It features a master volume and balancer, rather than two volume controls. The bridge is a Tone Shift Bass Bridge.

These may not be original.

Controls: Master Volume, Balancer, Master Tone
Nut Width: 38.0mm
Bridge String Spacing: 19.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 2024
Country of Manufacture: JAPAN

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Gig Bag

Text: Ryoma Terao

Inspection 담당: Yamaji

Product Photos: Tei

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

● Guaranteed Buyback Price

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

● Warranty Against Defects

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.

* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you purchase an item, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: 【new】Mayones / JABBA HF5 Aged Yellow 4.37kg #JAB2605675【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $7,164
item.description:
$7,164 · Brand New · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Mayones is a high-end brand that manufactures cutting-edge guitars and basses in Poland.


Its quality is well-established, as it is favored by top musicians such as Hadrien Feraud and Federico Malaman. (Titles omitted)


The Jabba is a model that takes the traditional Jazz Bass as its motif and develops it further.


This is the Hadrien Feraud signature model of the Jabba.


Born in Paris in 1984, Hadrien Feraud may still be considered a mid-career musician, but his presence is already legendary.


His solo album, released at the young age of 23, features musicians such as John McLaughlin and Biréli Lagrène. (Titles omitted)


He is truly a top player of the new generation.


This model comes in several specifications, but this one is an Aged Yellow finish with a JJ pickup configuration.


The body is constructed with a Maple top, Swamp Ash back, and Pau Ferro fingerboard.


The body shape and joint design provide excellent access to the high frets, resulting in ultra-smooth playability.


It features a DELANO JMVC5 pickup and an original Musashi Nitōryū preamp.


Controls are simple: master volume (push/pull - active/passive), balancer, treble, middle, and bass.


While offering a smooth playing feel, it delivers a robust, harmonically rich, and beautiful sound.


The preamp also functions as a headphone amplifier, allowing for direct headphone monitoring.


These modern features are another appealing aspect of the brand.


While 24-fret JB models can sometimes sound too tight, this model avoids that negative impression, producing a supple, harmonically rich, and beautiful sound.


A perfectly balanced, supreme modern bass.


SPECS


Body:Swamp Ash

Top:Maple

Neck heel:Special contoured for easy upper frets access

Unique Features:Bolt-on (6 screws mounted in ferrules) construction with contoured heel

Construction:Bolt-on neck joint with a 6-screw mounted on ferrules

Scale:34.25"" (870 mm)

Neck:1-pc / Hard Rock Maple TEW

Radius:20"" (508 mm)

Fingerboard:Birdseye Maple – T.E.W. (Tonally Enhanced Wood)

Markers & Inlays:Acrylic block markers Original Luminlay™ side dots, SGM-23 Super Green in Black pipe, 3 mm

Neck dimensions: Width at nut – 43.0 mm Width XII fret – 61.7 mm Width XXIV fret – 70.8 mm Thickness I fret – 20.0 mm Thickness XII fret – 23.0 mm

Truss rod:Double action truss rod

Frets:24 jumbo, Ferd Wagner 9665, 18% N/S Hard

Crown dimensions: 2.64 × 1.20 mm (w × h)

Headstock:Straight; topped with chosen body wood Body matching finish Golden Mayones logo & signature

item.title: 【used】Ulrich Bass Design / Retro57 P old style 4st Bass 2023 3.320kg【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $4,281
item.description:
$4,281 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Ulrich Bass Design is a small, handmade bass brand from Germany.

The builder, Florian Hertzsch, is also a violin maker.

A key characteristic of this brand is its refined balance of modern basses, incorporating a wide range of classical techniques and Spanish guitar construction.

I've met Florian many times in Germany, and he's a truly wonderful person.

Young, intelligent, and incredibly talented, I believe he's a leader in the next generation of the guitar industry.

The Retro57 is a model that takes the tone of a classic P-bass as its motif, but finishes it in a modern style.

The body is made of ultra-lightweight Honduras Cedar.

The fingerboard and neck are made of maple.

It features Häussel P old-style pickups.

The crisp, vibrant string vibrations are vividly reproduced, demonstrating the high performance of these pickups.

The tuning machines and bridge are GOTOH, ensuring top-notch quality.

The control panel is held in place by magnets and can be easily removed by hand.

The headstock is very unique.

This incorporates the structure of a Spanish guitar.

This style was perfected by Antonio de Torres in the 1800s, and Florian stated that it is the best and clearly superior style for Ulrich Bass Design.

While it sounds like a typical P-bass, it has a more natural, almost acoustic bass-like nuance, reminiscent of an acoustic bass played through a high-quality piezo pickup.

The lack of ornamentation and the fast tempo might make it slightly difficult to play in some ways, but the sheer joy of playing the bass more than makes up for it.

The frets have approximately 90% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some dents, scratches, and paint chips, but due to the aged finish, it's impossible to determine if these were later acquired.

The electronics are in good condition.
No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Volume, Tone
Nut Width: 40.3mm
Bridge String Spacing: 19.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 2023
Country of Manufacture: Germany

GIB craftsmen will adjust the instrument for easy playability before delivery.

Accessories: Hard case, spec sheet

Text: Ryoma Terao

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product Photos: Tei

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!

item.title: Sadowsky Guitars USED ​​MetroExpress 21-Fret Vintage J/J Bass 5st (CAR/MR) — $876.61
item.description:
$876.61 · Good · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

-----------------------------------

Please be noted this one is USED not new.
There is not any issue on the function and the playing condition but blemishes on the cosmetic.
Please send message for more detail information of the condition.

-----------------------------------

The Active JB style delivers high cost performance!

The "Metro Express series," which took the world by storm with its high cost performance as an entry-level model for the newly revamped Sadowsky.
Featuring a 21-fret neck with a Morado fingerboard, a compact Dinky-shaped body, and a wide-range active circuit, this guitar strongly inherits the Sadowsky style while achieving astonishing cost performance.

The body is made of okoume wood, which Roger himself prototyped in NYC and received high praise for. It achieves an astonishingly light weight and excellent balance, comparable to higher-end models. The pickups are traditional single-coil style, reproducing a clear and tight sound. The preamp (passive switchable) reproduces the familiar wide-range "NY sound."

This instrument features a Morado fretboard and a JJ pickup layout. You can enjoy Sadowsky's signature clear and tight active sound with this instrument. Furthermore, while possessing surprising power for its class, it achieves a stable tone and sound image, allowing you to appreciate the exquisite balance that is unique to this brand. The clean design of the classic 2-band EQ, which eliminates the passive roll-off tone, also allows you to enjoy the straightforward charm of this brand's basses.

While incorporating some simplifications, this high-cost-performance model inherits the look and sound of the NYC/German models. It's recommended not only as an entry point to the original models, but also as a step up to the mid-range. Please try the Metro Express, which has the potential to become a new worldwide standard.

There are some minor scratches and light dents, but it is in relatively good condition.
The pickguard is raised below the front pickup, functioning as a finger ramp.

The truss rod has plenty of adjustment range, and the neck is in good condition.

Weight ≈ 4.34 kg
Accessories: Original gig bag

Este bajo, que forma parte de la edición del 30 aniversario, está diseñado para satisfacer a los bajistas más exigentes, combinando un estilo moderno con características únicas que garantizan un sonido excepcional y una experiencia de interpretación inigualable.
